headline: Crypto Plunges 5% on FOMC, Iran Tensions Rise

headline: US Futures Rise 1.2% on Iran Deal Relief

article.title: US Futures Climb as Iran Deal Offsets Hawkish Fed: Markets Wrap
article.summary: US stock futures rallied and oil prices retreated as President Donald Trump signed an interim deal to end the war with Iran and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, helping improve risk sentiment after the Federal Reserve’s hawkish hold.

headline: China AI Lab Surges 170% in 1 Day

article.title: China AI Lab’s 170% Stock Surge Cements Winner-Loser Pair Trade
article.summary: A pair trade is emerging in China’s artificial intelligence sector, with investors piling into the perceived winner and betting against its rival seen as losing ground in the race to build commercially viable AI models.

headline: France Ditches Legacy Encryption Amid $1B Crypto Risks

article.title: France to Phase Out Non-Quantum Encryption as Bitcoin Security Concerns Grow

headline: AI Disrupts 30% of Therapy Sessions: Crypto Investment Soars

article.title: Psychologists Say Patients Are Bringing AI Into Therapy Sessions: Survey
article.summary: A new APA survey found that more than a third of psychologists have patients using AI as an additional mental health professional, even as clinicians warn that the technology can reinforce delusions.

headline: CME Sues CFTC Over $10B Futures Approval
